title: lappula sessilis
intro: Lappula sessilis, also known as the dwarf lappula or small-head lappula, is a small annual plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, Lappula sessilis has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and even reducing fever. Lappula sessilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
